DEFT'S CONTC ORDER REQUEST FILED; PAID $10 FEE; TO FOLDER/TRAY.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR ARRIETA, LUIS LOPEZ ASSIGNED TO CREDITORS TRADE ASSOC,INC DBA GREAT WEST.COLL.BU.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARRIETA, LUIS LOPEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEHADE, NABIL (IND)DBA THE GOOD STUFF DISTRIBUTOR $842.51 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $842.51, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS PLAINTIFF'S NET WAGES OF $86.51 FOR HIS LAST DAY OF EMPLOYMENT, PLUS 9 DAYS OF WAIT TIME PENALTIES. PROOF OF SERVICE, PERSONAL ON NABIL CHEHADE FILED. ONE ALREADY ON FILE. PERSONAL SERVICE.
